content.en:
"It should not be far from the Purple Aurora Beast's lair!"

The Frostless Lord said.

At this moment, Lord Sound Dream grabbed the purple aurora beast and spied on its memory fragments again.

"It's around here, just a little further in that direction!"

Lord Sound Dream said.

"Let's go!"

Frost-free lord said.

The group shuttled away, took a little time, and saw a purple continent, an incomparably huge continent.

This is the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast.

"Be careful, I feel the aura of the half-step Legendary Realm! The Purple Aurora Beast Clan has a Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord. "

The Frostless Lord said solemnly.

"I sensed it too!" said Lord Umeng and Lord Otomu.

For the Purple Aurora Beast clan to have a half-step legendary realm, they were not surprised at all.

After all, a branch has an invincible powerhouse that can be called a transcendent realm legendary lord, and it is too normal for the headquarters to have a half-step legendary realm.

This is also the reason why the Frostless Lords and they have eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords, if there is only one Lord, it is really not necessary to get the Purple Aurora Beast Clan.

The Frostless Lord and they sensed the half-step Legendary Realm of the Purple Aurora Beast Clan, and the Half-Step Legendary Realm of the Purple Aurora Beast Clan also naturally sensed the Frostless Lord and them.

Airplanes!!!

In the Purple Aurora Light Domain, a will phantom appeared, and it was the projection of the will of the half-step Legendary Realm Lord of the Purple Aurora Beast Clan.

"Get out of here!"

There are no superfluous words, and it is directly an expulsion

"Let's do it directly, the Purple Aurora Beast clan won't discuss it with us. "

The Frostless Lord said.

Whoa!!

The eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords flew directly to the Purple Continent, and before they could fly in, the Purple Aurora Beast Clan flew out of three half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

The Great War has begun!

Ye Tian couldn't participate in such a big battle, but he had another task, and that was to copy these time talents

"Copy!"

"Copy'!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian continued to copy the time talent of these Purple Aurora Beasts, and even entered the Purple Continent to copy

There were indeed quite a few Purple Aurora Beasts here, so it was enough for him to copy.

Soon.

There is a Purple Aurora Beast to hunt him down, and it is also a Transcendental Purple Aurora Beast, not weaker than the previous Transcendental Purple Aurora Beast.

That's when it happened.

A ray of light directly smashed this transcendent realm purple aurora beast to pieces, killing him instantly.

Thank you, Lord Frostless!"

Ye Tian knew that this was the Frostless Lord's move, otherwise he really wouldn't be able to compete with this Transcendent Realm Purple Aurora Beast.

"Endless Lord, there are still many Purple Aurora Beasts at the level of Transcendent Realm Legendary Lords in this Purple Continent, don't go deep. The Frostless Lord reminded.

Ye Tian nodded, and no longer entered, and when the Frostless Lord and they resolved the battle, he went deep into the Purple Continent to slowly copy the time talent.

Immediately, he concentrated on observing the battle of Lord Frostless and the others.

The battle was almost one-sided, and the three half-step Legendary Realm Purple Aurora Beasts were not at all the opponents of the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords such as the Frostless Lord, and they were completely beaten, and soon these three half-step Legendary Realm Purple Aurora Beasts were seriously injured

Abrupt.

A half-step Legendary Realm Lord-level Purple Aurora Beast was frozen into a cloud of ice by the Frostless Lord, and this ice cube was quickly shattered, and even the body carrying this Purple Aurora Beast was shattered, turning into countless fragments.

But the Purple Aurora Beast didn't die, and the countless fragments were frozen by the Frostless Lord again, turning into countless ice particles.

"Smash!"

"Frozen!"

"Smash!"

"Frozen!"

After repeating this dozens of times, this Purple Aurora Beast really fell.

It is extremely difficult to separate life and death between half-step Legendary Realms, but the Frostless Lord can kill a Purple Aurora Beast of a half-step Legendary Realm, which shows how powerful its strength is

Not long after, the other two half-step Legendary Realm Purple Aurora Beasts also fell one by one.

If it is in the Infinite Sea, it is extremely difficult to kill a half-step Legendary Realm, because many half-step Legendary Realm lords have backers behind them, and once they are in a desperate situation, the Legendary Realm Lord can come down with a single thought, which is too difficult to kill.

But these Purple Aurora Beasts had no backers, only themselves.

If the Purple Aurora Beast gave birth to a Legendary Realm Lord, it would be enough to become a powerful racial force in the Void Region, otherwise once it encountered today's situation, it could only be reduced to a lamb.

"Let's enter!"

Frost-free lord said.

Ye Tian followed the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords into the Purple Continent and started a new round of replication journey.

However, the purpose of the eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords was very simple, that is, to find Time Hengjin.

Ye Tian didn't look for Time Hengjin, he was only a Realm Realm Legendary Lord, and he didn't need Time Hengjin yet.Moreover, if he really found Time Hengjin, he didn't dare to compete with the half-step Legendary Realm Lords!

Of course, the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lords have found enough Time Hengjin to build the Bridge of Time in the True Void Holy Land, and he will also have the hope of walking on the Bridge of Time in the future.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, after all, if he copied those time talents, he could copy them in an instant, so in a short time, he copied all the time talents on this purple continent.

"'You've found it!'

The Frostless Lords, they finally found Time Hengjin at this time.

And after Ye Tian got the news, he immediately shuttled over.

--------------------

An underground, which has been torn apart, presents a huge opening in the ground.

In this underground opening, a flash of purple light seeped out, and these purple lights contained the power of time.

The eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords didn't have the time to enter it, because the Time Constant Gold Vein was not an ordinary place, and they were not allowed to enter it casually until they knew the yield of this vein.

Because there is a very powerful (good) power of time here, which can even corrode their bodies

Some times the time dimension where the Constant Gold Vein is located is unstable, and if you are not careful, you will fall into the long river of time.

In the gray mist stone statue, the long river of time is intercepted and flowed out, and it can be entered or exited.

But once you accidentally fall into the long river of time, you can't get out.

If you can come out casually, wouldn't it be better to ask a Legendary Realm Lord to throw yourself into the long river of time?

That way, the Bridge of Time wouldn't be so precious.

The Bridge of Time can not only send them into the River of Time, but also make the River of Time a little more stable and safe in that place, and they can also exit freely, which is the value of the Bridge of Time.

They don't want to lose a clone because of carelessness.

At their level, each doppelganger is of high value and cannot be damaged easily, otherwise it will take a long time to recondense it. _
